interface.longDescription: Wayground helps teachers and students turn teaching and learning materials into ready-to-assign quizzes and study cards. Paste or reference instructional content, and Wayground generates aligned questions and flashcards directly from it — no need to rewrite lessons as assessments. Teachers use it to save prep time and quickly check understanding. Students use it to practice and self-check from the same material. Generated activities are delivered through Wayground, with reporting so teachers can see how students are engaging and where they need support.
defaultPrompt: Create quiz on subtraction of integers
